overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white coat walking through an industrial office interior. The character approaches a reception desk with a seated NPC, pauses briefly, then continues walking through the facility past another worker in a yellow vest.

large metal pipes running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an industrial break room with green benches and metal storage shelving. Exposed pipes run along the ceiling, and a water cooler stands against the left wall as the character approaches the reception area at the far end.

events.description: arrives at the reception desk area
character turns around and begins walking away from the desk

agents.ego_description: approaches the reception desk, pauses to face the seated worker, then turns and departs

large dark screen mounted on the wall behind the desk

segments.scene_description: The character stops at a reception desk where an NPC is seated. A modern white chair and potted plant sit near the desk, with a large monitor on the wall behind. After a brief pause, the character turns and walks away from the desk area.

scene_state.functional_zone: office corridor with glass partitions and work areas

events.description: passes by a standing worker in a yellow safety vest near a workbench

agents.ego_description: walking away from the reception area through the office space toward an exit

upholstered bench seating against the glass wall
long table with equipment and cardboard boxes

open doorway leading to another area of the facility

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an office corridor with glass partitions and blue seating. Passing metal storage racks, the character approaches a workbench where a worker in a yellow safety vest stands, heading toward an open doorway at the far end of the room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an industrial facility that transitions from a utilitarian break room into a modern office corridor. It begins by following a character in a white coat past green benches, metal shelving, and a water cooler under a ceiling of exposed pipes. As the character reaches the far end of the room, the camera pauses at a reception desk featuring a seated NPC, a potted plant, and a large wall monitor before the character turns to move away. The scene then shifts into a corridor defined by glass partitions and blue seating, passing more storage racks as the environment opens up. Finally, the camera follows the character past a worker in a yellow safety vest at a workbench and toward an open doorway at the end of the hall.
